narration: Ever wondered how life evolves slowly, step by step?

narration: Gradualism suggests that evolution happens in small, incremental changes over long periods.
visual_description: Context visual: Gradualism suggests that evolution happens in small, incremental changes over long periods.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Gradualism suggests that evolution happens in small, incremental changes over long periods.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Gradualism suggests that evolution happens in small, incremental changes over long periods.

narration: Unlike rapid shifts or sudden appearances of new species, gradualism focuses on the slow build-up.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Unlike rapid shifts or sudden appearances of new species, gradualism focuses on the slow build-up.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Unlike rapid shifts or sudden appearances of new species, gradualism focuses on the slow build-up.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Unlike rapid shifts or sudden appearances of new species, gradualism focuses on the slow build-up.

narration: Fossil records often show these subtle changes—over millions of years—like the evolution of horses from small, forest-dwelling creatures.
